description: Colour pop sandals from enroute, from the brand's Teen collection featuring every bright colour in your summer wardrobe! On days when you don't feel like mixing and matching, just slip into these sandals and you'll look great, effortlessly! Upper Multi-coloured forefoot and midfoot straps featuring rivet details on it Ankle strap looping around the ankle with a Velcro closure Nubuck footbed Outsole TPU textured outsole with an upraised heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
